_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: deno generic
author: aetherix@lunexia.com
description:
A generic Deno egg.

Deno v2.7 — secure TypeScript runtime. Security-first with explicit permission flags.

This will clone a git repo. Defaults to master branch.
Permissions: --allow-net --allow-read --allow-env --allow-write
startup: if [[ -d .git ]] && [[ {{AUTO_UPDATE}} == "1" ]]; then git pull; fi; /usr/bin/deno run --allow-net --allow-read --allow-env --allow-write /home/container/{{MAIN_FILE}}

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Deno Generic Installation Script
# by Aetherix-ops
#
apt update && apt install -y git curl jq file unzip
mkdir -p /mnt/server && cd /mnt/server

if [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "true" ] || [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "1" ]; then
    echo "user upload mode."; exit 0
fi

[[ ${GIT_ADDRESS} != *.git ]] && GIT_ADDRESS=${GIT_ADDRESS}.git
[ -z "${USERNAME}" ] || GIT_ADDRESS="https://${USERNAME}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@$(echo ${GIT_ADDRESS} | cut -d/ -f3-)"

if [ ! "$(ls -A /mnt/server)" ]; then
    git clone ${GIT_ADDRESS} /mnt/server
    [ ! -z "${BRANCH}" ] && git checkout ${BRANCH}
fi

if [ -f /mnt/server/deno.json ] || [ -f /mnt/server/deno.jsonc ]; then
    echo "caching deno dependencies..."
    /usr/bin/deno cache /mnt/server/${MAIN_FILE}
fi

echo "install complete"

variables.name: Main File
variables.description: Main file to run. Default is main.ts

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Pull latest git on startup. 1 = enabled.

variables.name: User Upload
variables.description: Set to 1 if uploading your own files.
